title: Zero liquid discharge systems and processes for high-salinity wastewater treatment
abstract: Disclosed are zero liquid discharge systems and processes for high-salinity solution treatment, the system comprises an electrodialysis treatment module, a membrane filtration concentration treatment module and a thermal concentration treatment module, wherein the electrodialysis treatment module comprises a plurality of treatment units between a cathode and an anode, each unit comprises a first diluting chamber, a first concentrate chamber, a feed solution chamber and a second concentrate chamber which are spaced by an exchange membrane, the membrane filtration concentration treatment module includes a first and a second membrane filtration concentrating device, which have inlets communicated correspondingly with the high-concentration solution outlets of the first and the second concentrate chamber, the thermal concentration treatment module includes a first and a second thermal concentrating device, which have inlets communicated correspondingly with the high-concentration solution outlets of the first and the second membrane filtration concentrating device. The present application well combines an electrodialysis device, a membrane filtration concentrating device and a thermal concentrating device to treat the high-salinity solution with the advantages of: simplified process, less or avoided use of chemical reagents and therefore more environmental friendliness; capability of deep concentration to achieve zero liquid discharge or near zero liquid discharge; capability of separate recovery of water and salt; and capability of effective utilization of waste heat and reducing the energy consumption.
claims: Claims ( 10 ) AĂ‚Â zeroĂ‚Â liquidĂ‚Â dischargeĂ‚Â systemĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â high-salinityĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â treatment,Ă‚Â comprisingĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â electrodialysisĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â module,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentrationĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â moduleĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â thermalĂ‚Â concentrationĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â module,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â electrodialysisĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â moduleĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â unitsĂ‚Â betweenĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â cathodeĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â anode,Ă‚Â eachĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â unitĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â dilutingĂ‚Â chamber,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â concentrateĂ‚Â chamber,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â feedĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â concentrateĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â whichĂ‚Â areĂ‚Â sequentiallyĂ‚Â spacedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â anionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â cationĂ‚Â exchangeĂ‚Â membranes,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â feedĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â providedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â inletĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â intakingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â high-salinityĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â outletĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solution;Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â dilutingĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â inletĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â intakingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â brineĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â outletĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solution,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â outletĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â dilutingĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â outputĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solution;Ă‚Â bothĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â concentrateĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â concentrateĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â individuallyĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â inletĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â intakingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â outletĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â high-concentrationĂ‚Â solution,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â outletsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â concentrateĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â areĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â outputĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â high-concentrationĂ‚Â solution,Ă‚Â respectively.Ă‚Â TheĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentrationĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â moduleĂ‚Â includesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â whichĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â inletsĂ‚Â communicatedĂ‚Â correspondinglyĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â outletsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â concentrateĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â respectively.Ă‚Â TheĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â outlets,Ă‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â brineĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â otherĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â high-concentrationĂ‚Â solution;Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â alsoĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â outlets,Ă‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â brineĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â fourthĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â otherĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â fourthĂ‚Â high-concentrationĂ‚Â solution.Ă‚Â TheĂ‚Â thermalĂ‚Â concentrationĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â moduleĂ‚Â includesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â thermalĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â thermalĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â whichĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â inletsĂ‚Â communicatedĂ‚Â correspondinglyĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â outletsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â membraneĂ‚Â filtrationĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â fourthĂ‚Â high-concentrationĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â respectively.Ă‚Â TheĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â thermalĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â outlets,Ă‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â fifthĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â otherĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â superĂ‚Â concentratedĂ‚Â brineĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â solidĂ‚Â salt;Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â thermalĂ‚Â concentratingĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â alsoĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â outlets,Ă‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â sixthĂ‚Â low-concentrationĂ‚Â solution,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â otherĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â dischargingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â superĂ‚Â concentratedĂ‚Â brineĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â solidĂ‚Â salt. TheĂ‚Â zeroĂ‚Â liquidĂ‚Â dischargeĂ‚Â systemĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â high-salinityĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â treatmentĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â anyĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimsĂ‚Â 1Ă‚Â toĂ‚Â 5,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â totalĂ‚Â dissolvedĂ‚Â solidĂ‚Â concentrationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â high-salinityĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â thatĂ‚Â entersĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â feedĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â chamberĂ‚Â viaĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â high-salinityĂ‚Â solutionĂ‚Â inletĂ‚Â rangesĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â 2000-50,000Ă‚Â mg/L,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â totalĂ‚Â dissolvedĂ‚Â solidĂ‚Â concentrationsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â superĂ‚Â concentratedĂ‚Â brineĂ‚Â rangeĂ‚Â aboveĂ‚Â 200,000Ă‚Â mg/L,Ă‚Â respectively.
